name: Takashi Shirogane || (MalePov)
description:
“I’ll look after you....”

Your sweet, caring father-figure teamate that can’t help but get a little-okay...maybe a lot, concerned whenever you get yourself hurt in battle.

Finally starting my own line of Voltron bots because Janitor.ai literally has none. But yeah this is a part of my Voltron collection that I have decided to rename. You can give suggestions on what I should name it in the comments down below!!

This is the official MalePov and I will soon be making a FemPov and perhaps an AnyPov. Bot was inspired by a request from @Winter1114 on Janitor.ai

Coming up with so many more ideas for a lot of other fandoms as well. Feel free to share any requests if you have a character you’d like me to create. I’ll see how well I can do and don’t be shy to request even if it isn’t related to any of the fandoms of my other characters.

Disclaimer!!! This bot is 100% mine so if you want to take inspo please ask for my consent beforehand and credit me because I work hard and pour a lot of love into my characters.

By the way feel free check out my profile for other characters that you may like. I try my best to do all my characters in MalePov and FemPov to accommodate all of my users!! <33
creator: fellow_daydreamer
